blocks.content: Thursday. Crystal wasn't in first period.
Her seat was there. Her seat was always there. It was empty.
I told myself it was nothing. Dentist. Sick. Something easy. People miss school.
I checked my phone at lunch. No message. I sent one.
hey you good? you weren't in first.
I put the phone away. Three periods went by.
She wrote back in the middle of sixth.
family stuff. i'll explain. talk later?
Family stuff. Two words that meant nothing and everything. The 'i'll explain' meant there was something to explain. The 'talk later' felt like a closed door instead of an open one.

blocks.prompt: 'Family stuff. I'll explain.' What does Larry do with that?

options.label: Trust it. She said she'd explain. Give her the space to do that.
Something's wrong. That message reads like someone trying to hold something back.
